title: Cyperus schraderi
taxonomy: Cyperus schraderi is classified under the family Cyperaceae, commonly known as the sedge family. This classification is based on its characteristics and morphological features, which are typical of the Cyperaceae family. The genus Cyperus is further divided into several species, with Cyperus schraderi being one of the notable species within this group. The species Cyperus schraderi is native to North America and is often found growing in wetland areas. The classification of Cyperus schraderi is further refined at the level of kingdom, phylum, class, order, and family, which places it within the kingdom Plantae, phylum Angiospermophyta, class Liliopsida, order Poales, and family Cyperaceae.

This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of wounds, infections, and respiratory issues.
